{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/4522799?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/dtrudg", "id": 4522799, "login": "dtrudg", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ1MjI3OTk=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48785", "cvss": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Impact

The `limit container paths directive` in `apptainer.conf` is intended to allow a system administrator limit the paths from which containers can be run, under setuid mode. Due to incorrect matching of a path string, sibling directories with similar names may incorrectly be allowed.

For example, the configuration:
```
limit container paths = /data/safe
```
Will also allow containers in /data/safe-but-unsafe to be run.

### Patches

The issue is patched in apptainer version 1.5.1.

### Workarounds

If developers do not use setuid mode or do not use the `limit container paths` functionality, then this issue does not affect their installation. Note that, as documented [1], if user namespaces are allowed for unrestricted use then this functionality does not stop users from running any container of their choice.

If developers do use the `limit container paths` functionality they are advised to update.

### Credit

This vulnerability was discovered and disclosed to the Apptainer project by Dave Trudgian of Sylabs.

### Resources

[1] https://apptainer.org/docs/admin/latest/configfiles.html#limiting-container-execution", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T19:20:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48785"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T19:20:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/apptainer/apptainer/security/advisories/GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/apptainer/apptainer/security-advisories/GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apptainer/apptainer", "summary": "Apptainer has incorrect path matching for 'limit container paths' directive ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T19:20:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cr2j-534f-mf3g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/apptainer/apptainer"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Apptainer has incorrect path matching for 'limit container paths' directive
